case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. FRANCISCO'S MEXICAN FOOD, LLC, A LIMITED

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCISCO'S MEXICAN FOOD, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA VALLARTA TACO BAR $63,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $63,250.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
